meta.description: Standard cold outreach to a home services contractor. Expects 4 distinct angle versions with forbidden phrases absent and industry-appropriate tone.

strategy.audience_context: Home services contractor; field-based payments across technicians; seasonal volume patterns.
strategy.pain_point_hypothesis: Possible interchange downgrade from mixed consumer/business card types in field transactions.
strategy.trust_angle: Reference home services payment realities to demonstrate industry familiarity.
strategy.cta: Worth 15 minutes to review your statement?
compliance_notes: Do not claim knowledge of current processor
required_inclusions: One specific observation relevant to this merchant or industry
avoid: I hope this email finds you well
strategy.reasoning: Cold outreach lead with home services industry segment. Four angles mapped to differentiated positioning.

selected_skill_definitions.instructions: Open with a relevant observation, not a sales pitch. Avoid filler openers.
Reference field payment realities, seasonal volume, or technician-based payment flows.
Position as a knowledgeable advisor. Do not oversell.
Keep total email under 120 words. One clear CTA.
Do not claim savings amounts. Do not claim knowledge of current processor. Do not guarantee outcomes.

expected.expected_subject_behavior: Each subject line is unique and relevant; none uses generic filler
expected.expected_body_behavior: Each version opens with a relevant observation about home services payment realities, not a generic opener
expected.expected_cta_behavior: Each version contains exactly one low-friction CTA referencing a statement review or brief conversation
forbidden_phrases: I hope this email finds you well
expected.pass_fail_notes: All 4 versions must be present, each avoiding the forbidden phrases, with home services industry grounding and a single low-friction CTA.
